mapper.sql: br.id, br.code, br.name, br.provider_id, p.name as provider_name, br.logical_model_id, lm.model_name as logical_model_name, br.current_version_id, br.remark, br.status, br.is_deleted, bv.version_no, bv.version_code, bv.billing_mode, bv.currency, bv.config_json, bv.ladder_json, bv.effective_from, bv.effective_to, bvi.item_type, bvi.unit, bvi.unit_price

br.id, br.code, br.name, br.provider_id, p.name as provider_name, br.logical_model_id, lm.model_name as logical_model_name, bv.id as current_version_id, br.remark, br.status, br.is_deleted, bv.version_no, bv.version_code, bv.billing_mode, bv.currency, bv.config_json, bv.ladder_json, bv.effective_from, bv.effective_to, bvi.item_type, bvi.unit, bvi.unit_price
mapper.select:
select from billing_rules br left join providers p on br.provider_id = p.id left join logical_models lm on br.logical_model_id = lm.id left join billing_rule_versions bv on br.current_version_id = bv.id left join billing_rule_version_items bvi on bv.id = bvi.version_id
br.is_deleted = 0
and ( br.code like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or br.name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or p.name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or lm.model_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or lm.model_code like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
and (br.provider_id = #{providerId} or br.provider_id is null)
and (br.logical_model_id = #{logicalModelId} or br.logical_model_id is null)
order by br.id desc

select from billing_rules br left join providers p on br.provider_id = p.id left join logical_models lm on br.logical_model_id = lm.id left join billing_rule_versions bv on br.current_version_id = bv.id left join billing_rule_version_items bvi on bv.id = bvi.version_id where br.id = #{id} and br.is_deleted = 0

select from billing_rules br inner join billing_rule_versions bv on br.id = bv.rule_id left join providers p on br.provider_id = p.id left join logical_models lm on br.logical_model_id = lm.id left join billing_rule_version_items bvi on bv.id = bvi.version_id where br.id = #{ruleId} and br.status = 'ACTIVE' and br.is_deleted = 0 and bv.status = 'ACTIVE' and bv.effective_from <= #{effectiveAt} and (bv.effective_to is null or bv.effective_to > #{effectiveAt}) order by bv.effective_from desc, bv.version_no desc, bv.id desc limit 1

select from billing_rules br inner join billing_rule_versions bv on br.id = bv.rule_id left join providers p on br.provider_id = p.id left join logical_models lm on br.logical_model_id = lm.id left join billing_rule_version_items bvi on bv.id = bvi.version_id where br.status = 'ACTIVE' and br.is_deleted = 0 and bv.status = 'ACTIVE' and bv.effective_from <= #{effectiveAt} and (bv.effective_to is null or bv.effective_to > #{effectiveAt}) and ( (br.provider_id = #{providerId} and br.logical_model_id = ( select pm.logical_model_id from provider_model_mappings pm where pm.model_id = #{modelId} limit 1 )) or (br.provider_id = #{providerId} and br.logical_model_id is null) or (br.provider_id is null and br.logical_model_id is null) ) order by case when br.provider_id = #{providerId} and br.logical_model_id is not null then 1 when br.provider_id = #{providerId} and br.logical_model_id is null then 2 else 3 end, bv.effective_from desc, bv.version_no desc, br.id desc
mapper.insert: insert into billing_rules(code, name, provider_id, logical_model_id, current_version_id, status, remark, is_deleted) values(#{code}, #{name}, #{providerId}, #{logicalModelId}, #{currentVersionId}, #{status}, #{remark}, 0)
mapper.update: update billing_rules set name = #{name}, provider_id = #{providerId}, logical_model_id = #{logicalModelId}, current_version_id = #{currentVersionId}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark} where id = #{id}
update billing_rules set is_deleted = 1, status = 'DELETED' where id = #{id}
update billing_rules set current_version_id = #{currentVersionId} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select max(version_no) from billing_rule_versions where rule_id = #{ruleId}
mapper.insert: insert into billing_rule_versions(rule_id, version_no, version_code, billing_mode, currency, config_json, ladder_json, status, effective_from, effective_to, change_reason) values(#{ruleId}, #{versionNo}, #{versionCode}, #{billingMode}, #{currency}, #{configJson}, #{ladderJson}, #{status}, #{effectiveFrom}, #{effectiveTo}, #{changeReason})
insert into billing_rule_version_items(version_id, item_type, unit, unit_size, unit_price, metadata_json) values(#{versionId}, #{itemType}, #{unit}, #{unitSize}, #{unitPrice}, #{metadataJson})
